Unit tests for the ticket approval state machine.
UT-001: Submit from PENDING stays PENDING, increments version.
UT-002: Submit from REJECTED transitions to PENDING.
UT-003: Submit from APPROVED raises InvalidTransitionError.
UT-004: Approve from PENDING transitions to APPROVED.
UT-005: Approve from REJECTED raises InvalidTransitionError.
UT-006: Reject from PENDING transitions to REJECTED.
UT-007: Reject without comment raises ValidationError.
UT-008: Close from APPROVED transitions to CLOSED.
UT-009: Close from REJECTED transitions to CLOSED.
UT-010: Close from PENDING raises InvalidTransitionError.
UT-011: Approval action is recorded atomically with status change.
